test.command: ssh -J root@wittymantis.netbird.selfhosted root@192.168.1.189 'cd /root/mi50grad && PYTHONPATH=/root/mi50grad python3 tests/test_flash_attn_256.py && python3 tests/test_gemm_fp16_prefill.py && python3 tests/test_elementwise.py && python3 tests/test_gemv_int4.py'
test.notes: All 4 non-regression test files pass. bench_optimization_final.py also runs successfully producing bench/optimization_final.json

typecheck.command: N/A - project uses HIP C++ kernels + Python scripts without static type checking configured

lint.command: ssh -J root@wittymantis.netbird.selfhosted root@192.168.1.189 'cd /root/mi50grad && for f in src/kernels/flash_attn_256_v3.hip src/kernels/gemm_fp16_prefill.hip src/kernels/gemm_int4_prefill_v2.hip src/kernels/gemv_int4_v4.hip src/kernels/elementwise_v3.hip src/kernels/fused_skip_rmsnorm_gemv.hip src/kernels/gemm_fp16_prefill_silu.hip; do /opt/rocm/bin/hipcc -O3 --offload-arch=gfx906 -std=c++17 -shared -fPIC -o /tmp/test_compile.so $f 2>&1; done'
lint.notes: All 7 new/modified HIP kernel files compile for gfx906 with exit code 0. No errors or warnings treated as errors.

reviewsSummary.notes: scrutiny-feature-reviewer subagent was unavailable due to model configuration error (custom:CCS-sonnet not found). Review was performed directly by scrutiny-validator.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Final Benchmark Summary section with sprint results table, per-kernel speedup data, and INT4 GEMV v4 configuration guide (t8 recommended for decode)

validationContractStatus.VAL-FINAL-001: pass - bench/optimization_final.json created and verified with 12 kernel category results
validationContractStatus.VAL-FINAL-002: pass - bench/optimization_report.md shows side-by-side comparison; 5 of 6 areas improved (exceeds 3 minimum)
validationContractStatus.VAL-CROSS-001: pass - all 4 existing tests pass: test_flash_attn_256.py, test_gemm_fp16_prefill.py, test_elementwise.py, test_gemv_int4.py
validationContractStatus.VAL-CROSS-002: pass - all 7 new .hip kernel files compile successfully for gfx906

keyFindings: INT4 GEMM on-the-fly dequant: 2.07x speedup (largest gain) - LDS bandwidth reduction from 4x smaller B tile
FlashAttention v3 prefill: 1.58-1.99x speedup - block-tiled approach scales well with seq_len
Elementwise v3 (float4 loads): 1.33x RMSNorm speedup; SiLU and residual_add see <2% improvement (already bandwidth-saturated)
INT4 GEMV v4: t8 config best (1.06x speedup at N=4096); t16 regresses slightly due to fdot2 dequant overhead
FP16 GEMM double-buffer: 1.02-1.09x speedup (modest - kernel is compute-bound at M=128)
Fused skip-RMSNorm+GEMV: 1.07x speedup (eliminates norm_out HBM round-trip for single-block case)
SiLU epilogue GEMM: 0.82x regression at M=128 (compute-dominated, fusion overhead exceeds HBM savings)
